ChangeRequest.name: [SHS] Instrument ESA 2010 class
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
# Overview
How to handle the classification of Securities according to SHS requirement "Instrument ESA 2010 Class"?
### Contact person
@Arjan.Bos, @sdressler
### Business definition
The following ESA 2010 instrument types should be provided:
* short-term debt securities (F.31) * long-term debt securities (F.32) * listed shares (F.511) * money market funds (MMF) shares or units (F.521) * non-MMF investment fund shares or units (F.522)
### Legal definition
See https://www.ecb.europa.eu/pub/pdf/other/ecb.guidance_notes_to_reporting_agents_on_shs_regulation202005~f7bce14823.en.pdf paragraph 5.4.2
### Reason for inclusion
_\[Justifications\]_
### Relationships
- Security
### Relevant Framework/Template
- SHS
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
